subcodes.title: Words to the governor of Akka and others, spoken on 1915-04-02
subcodes.first_line: the Beloved gave a detailed and stirring account of the history of Akka from the time it was taken by the Crusaders in 1104 A.D... I have no doubt that had he the inclination and desire he could write a most instructive history of this ancient and sacred town.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
